turn_info.content: Hi there, are you free to talk?

results.term: I have been feeling terrible about the death of my...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have been feeling terrible about the death of my dad. It would have been his birthday last week and that makes it even worse.

results.term: He was only in his early sixties but he suffered a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: He was only in his early sixties but he suffered a number of health problems, including early onset dementia.

results.term: I presume you mean now and not not ;). Though I si...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I presume you mean now and not not ;). Though I simply am not a believer. It just made me think how meaningless life was.

results.term: I do not really know what to do about my feelings....

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I do not really know what to do about my feelings. They are not going away.

results.term: Do you think that people ever really recover from ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Do you think that people ever really recover from a significant bereavement?

results.term: I think that what you said there was very wise. Ma...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think that what you said there was very wise. Maybe it's worse, in some ways, to feel that your grief has lessened .. there is guilt that comes with that.

results.term: Whilst it hurts to think about him being dead, I t...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Whilst it hurts to think about him being dead, I think that it would hurt more if I had totally forgotten about him and did not think about him every day.

results.term: It is just - very hard. I keep thinking about all ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It is just - very hard. I keep thinking about all the times I disagreed with him or did not appreciate him enough and I never got to tell him how much I loved him.

results.term: I know that he did :). I had just not expected to ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I know that he did :). I had just not expected to lose him at such a comparatively young age. He did not get to enjoy his retirement!

results.term: Yes. I think it would have been easier to deal wit...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes. I think it would have been easier to deal with had he not immediately descended into very bad health as soon as he retired and had had time to have some fun.

results.term: I can't really afford to have therapy at the momen...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I can't really afford to have therapy at the moment. Also I know that my dad was just have considered it to be a waste of money - he was very careful with money.

results.term: That is a really sensible suggestion and it cheers...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That is a really sensible suggestion and it cheers me up to think of it. You have been a really great help to me.

results.term: You really have been. I hope you have a great rest...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You really have been. I hope you have a great rest of day!
